renames.rationale: Small 18-instr leaf calls FreeLibrary plus FUN_14002f180 helper; classic module unload/cleanup shape with no other side effects.
24-instr thunk whose sole non-trivial callee is FUN_14000de30; called from two distinct sites (FUN_14000ef10, FUN_140003090) indicating shared adapter.
7-instr leaf whose only callee is _Ios_base_dtor; invoked from 4 sites — canonical MSVC std::ios_base destructor trampoline.
